opportunities.transformation_hook: Renter fixes ugly bathroom tile for $24 in one weekend, zero demo
opportunities.before_state: Dated, chipped, or clashing bathroom/kitchen tile the renter can't legally replace
opportunities.after_state: Fresh, modern tile look achieved with peel-and-stick covers over the existing tile
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's viral 'unique/ugly tile' powder bathroom post and HGTV's bath-space inspiration content are pushing renters toward instant tile-cover fixes right now.

opportunities.specific_product: solar deck post-cap and pathway light set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turn a dead, dark patio into a glowing hangout spot for $19
opportunities.before_state: Dark, unused backyard deck or patio once the sun goes down
opportunities.after_state: Warmly lit deck rail and pathway, usable for evening hangouts
opportunities.why_now: BHG's Pinterest feed is actively spotlighting Amazon solar deck lights starting at $18 as peak summer outdoor-living season hits its stride.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Cover a pet-hair-wrecked couch for $52 and make it look brand new
opportunities.before_state: Sofa covered in pet hair, stains, and visibly worn fabric
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, uniform stretch-cover couch that looks freshly upholstered
opportunities.why_now: Summer means more shedding pets and outdoor mess tracked onto furniture, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-margin pick on the board.

opportunities.specific_product: sliding barn door hardware track kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: Swap a boring hollow-core door for a farmhouse barn door for $89
opportunities.before_state: Plain, dated hollow-core interior door eating up swing space
opportunities.after_state: Statement sliding barn door with exposed rail hardware and reclaimed-wood look
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's sliding barn door feature pin is resurfacing a high-visual-impact, non-seasonal renovation trend that's easy to shoot as a dramatic before/after.

opportunities.specific_product: stackable fabric storage bins with labels
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turn a toy-explosion bedroom into an organized kids room for $34
opportunities.before_state: Kids bedroom floor buried in toys, clothes, and clutter
opportunities.after_state: Neatly organized labeled bins with everything sorted and put away
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's small kid's-bedroom-ideas pin signals back-to-school room-refresh searches starting to ramp up in mid-July.
